curriculum_title: BBF Lab Audio Dojo: Master 10-Lesson Interactive Language Series
developer_note: Designed for Akeem Brown and the BBF Lab development team. Formatted for the Dynamic Stitcher backend.

methodology_spec.verbal_pacing: Pimsleur-style interactive recall loop (English Prompt -> Silence -> Native target -> Silence -> Native Echo)

portuguese.title: First Encounters & Gym Greetings
portuguese.description: Learn standard daily greetings, exchange names, and check in at a gym or fitness facility in Portuguese.

challenges.prompt_english: How do you say 'Hello' to greet someone?
Now, greet them with 'Good morning'.
Do you remember how to say 'My name is Akeem'?
Ask someone 'How are you?' in a friendly, local way.
After exchanging names, say 'Nice to meet you'.
Put it together. Say: 'Hello, good morning! How are you?'

portuguese.title: Origins & Fitness Passion
portuguese.description: State your nationality and express your role as a personal trainer and business owner with enthusiasm.

challenges.prompt_english: Ask a male contact: 'Are you American?'
Respond proudly: 'Yes, I am American.'
Tell someone your profession: 'I am a personal trainer.'
Express your love for the grind: 'I love to train.'
Express the BBF core motto in Portuguese: 'We build and believe.'

portuguese.title: Finding Your Way around the Gym
portuguese.description: Master navigation directions and ask for specific locations of key amenities inside and outside a fitness center.

challenges.prompt_english: How do you ask: 'Where is the water?'
Now, ask where the bathrooms are located: 'Where are the restrooms?'
Instruct someone to go forward: 'Go straight.'
Now, tell them to change direction: 'Turn left.'
And how do you say: 'Turn right'?
Combine directions: 'Go straight and then turn right.'
challenges.native_target: Siga reto e depois vire à direita.

portuguese.title: Fueling Up — Café & Shakes
portuguese.description: Learn to order nutritious items at cafes or juice bars, specifying sugar preferences and asking about the bill.

challenges.prompt_english: Order your black coffee simply: 'A coffee, please.'
Enforce your nutrition protocol: 'Without sugar, please.'
Order your post-workout drink: 'A protein shake.'
Ask for the price: 'How much is it?'
Request the bill to conclude: 'The bill, please.'

portuguese.title: Numbers & Market Haggling
portuguese.description: Master numbers 1 to 10 and use strategic conversational objections to handle transactions in local markets.

vocabulary.english: Can you do it for five reais?

challenges.prompt_english: Count from one to three: 'One, two, three.'
Now count up to six: 'Four, five, six.'
Finish counting up to ten: 'Seven, eight, nine, ten.'
Object politely to a high price: 'It is too expensive.'
Propose a price cut: 'Can you do it for five reais?'

portuguese.title: Time, Schedules & Fasting
portuguese.description: Align your day, ask for the exact time, check training hours, and discuss your fasting status.

vocabulary.english: At what time do we train?

challenges.prompt_english: Ask for the current time: 'What time is it?'
Answer: 'It is eight o'clock.'
Tell your client or friend: 'I am fasting.'
Coordinate the session: 'At what time do we train?'
Confirm the block: 'Our workout is at ten.'

portuguese.title: Muscle Anatomy & Physical Sensation
portuguese.description: Discuss your physical condition, reference muscle groups (chest, back, legs), and describe aches or training soreness.

challenges.prompt_english: State the focus muscle group: 'Chest.'
Say the word for: 'Legs.'
Say the word for: 'Back.'
Explain that a muscle is hurting or sore: 'It hurts.'
Provide feedback on local fatigue: 'My legs are sore.'

portuguese.title: Organizing the Workout & Load
portuguese.description: Practice training commands such as push and pull, and direct changes to barbell weights and plate setups.

vocabulary.english: Put more weight on the barbell

challenges.prompt_english: Give an active lifting command: 'Push hard!'
Say the command for: 'Pull.'
Say the word for 'Barbell'.
Request an increase: 'More weight.'
Direct your training partner: 'Put more weight on the barbell.'

portuguese.title: Post-Workout Connections
portuguese.description: Establish solid relationships, praise training partners, and arrange the next schedule.

challenges.prompt_english: Congratulate your partner or client: 'Great workout!'
Say the word for: 'Tomorrow.'
Say a standard 'See you later.'
Say specifically: 'See you tomorrow.'
Confirm the timing: 'Tomorrow at the same schedule.'

portuguese.title: Slang & Immersive Integration
portuguese.description: Integrate previous conversational, spatial, and training blocks while adopting local, organic Brazilian expressions.

challenges.prompt_english: Declare your success: 'I speak Portuguese!'
Suggest collective action: 'Let's go together.'
Express casual excitement: 'Awesome!'
Refer to the famous Brazilian steakhouse: 'Barbecue house.'
Invite everyone: 'Let's go together to celebrate!'

After exchanging names, say 'Nice to meet you'.
Put it together. Say: 'Hola, buenos días! ¿Cómo estás?'
